modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to remove previous user profiles and passwords from Windows.

full_description_text: 
The user is experiencing issues with their computer, as it is still holding data from a previous user. They are looking for a way to delete passwords and clean up the system without having to reimage the device. This situation is causing storage concerns and requires assistance to resolve.
short_description: Need to remove previous user profiles and passwords from Windows.
description: The user is experiencing issues with their computer, as it is still holding data from a previous user. They are looking for a way to delete passwords and clean up the system without having to reimage the device. This situation is causing storage concerns and requires assistance to resolve.
